chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1192 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.5540/2020 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of CMA No.5541/2020 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 15.12.2022 Mr. Mian Imtiaz Ali Qureshi, Advocate for respondents-Pakistan Railways. Mr. Nisar Ahmed G. Abro, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. Respondent No.3 Zahoor Ahmed Butt (Assistant Personnel Officer working as Divisional Personnel Officer, Pakistan Railways, Sukkur) is present and files statement to the effect that the Gratuity and Leave Encashment in lieu of L.P.R. for 365 days amounting to Rs.14,24,479/- and Rs.4,78,200/-, have been paid through cheques No. B097650 and B097741 dated 01.01.2021 and 16.01.2021, respectively in the account of petitioner at National Bank of Pakistan, Sukkur. Moreover, Railway Quarter No.200/A situated at Reti Line Colony Sukkur, which was in possession of the petitioner, has been vacated by him. Perhaps grievances of the petitioners have been redressed, therefore, he is not in attendance. The petition stands disposed of along with listed applications in view of aforesaid statement of respondent No.3. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
